title: Citrus Coriander Toast
description: A citrusy and silky brunch dish featuring ground coriander, perfect for those with a low-FODMAP diet.

ingredients.name: 2 slices whole wheat bread
ingredients.notes: Choose your preferred type of bread. Whole wheat is generally safer for low-FODMAP diets.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons ground coriander
ingredients.notes: May need to adjust quantity based on personal preference.

ingredients.name: Pinch of salt
ingredients.notes: For taste, can be adjusted as needed.

instructions: Preheat your broiler according to manufacturer's instructions. The temperature should not exceed 425°F (218°C).
Toast the bread until lightly golden brown and crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together orange and lemon juice, ground coriander, and salt. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Spread the citrus coriander mixture generously on one side of each slice of toast.
Place the toasted toast under your preheated broiler for 1-2 minutes, or until the bread slices are charred but not burnt.
